item.title: Frontier AI models will continue pushing the limits in scientific research, biology and the physical sciences. But open-source models will handle what most people actually need every day. As we can se
item.description: pFrontier AI models will continue pushing the limits in scientific research, biology and the physical sciences.br /br /But open-source models will handle what most people actually need every day.br /br /As we can see, open-weight models are getting much cheaper and more useful as well.br /br /For th

item.description: pIn terms of AI capex worth remembering a US nuclear air craft carrier is $13bbr /br /US is going to spend more than that easily on AGI dominance, defence spending gonna pump/p

item.title: Great study! Scientists just discovered that nerves actively control skin aging 👀 For decades, scientists believed skin aging was mainly driven by DNA damage, UV exposure, inflammation and stem cell d
item.description: pGreat study!br /br /Scientists just discovered that nerves actively control skin aging 👀br /br /For decades, scientists believed skin aging was mainly driven by DNA damage, UV exposure, inflammation and stem cell decline.br /br /Now, researchers have discovered that glutamatergic sensory neurons in

item.title: A tiny universe in a bottle reveals clues to the origins of life
item.description: Researchers have created cosmic dust from scratch by recreating space-like conditions inside glass tubes. The dust contains complex carbon-rich molecules built from elements essential to life and produces infrared signals similar to real material found in space. By studying these laboratory samples,

item.title: I think aging is the biggest engineering problem biology ever created. Aging isn't caused by a single problem. It involves many interacting processes, such as DNA damage, protein misfolding, mitochond
item.description: pI think aging is the biggest engineering problem biology ever created.br /br /Aging isn't caused by a single problem. It involves many interacting processes, such as DNA damage, protein misfolding, mitochondrial dysfunction, cellular senescence, stem cell exhaustion, chronic inflammation and epigen

item.description: pthe following is evidence of the claim in the above at stages of gestation and sex development. item.title: Los Alamos tests NVIDIA Vera CPUs for neXt generation AI supercomputers 👀 The age of Agentic AI for scientific research is just beginning! Los Alamos National Laboratory is building three AI supercom
item.description: pLos Alamos tests NVIDIA Vera CPUs for neXt generation AI supercomputers 👀br /br /The age of Agentic AI for scientific research is just beginning!br /br /&gt; Los Alamos National Laboratory is building three AI supercomputers, Mission, Vision, and Veritas, powered by NVIDIA's Vera CPU and Rubin GPU

item.title: This is huge. Scientists just discover a way to help the Brain & Spinal cord repair themselves. Researchers built a miniature human brain-spinal cord model using stem cell-derived organoids to study w
item.description: pThis is huge. Scientists just discover a way to help the Brain & Spinal cord repair themselves.br /br /Researchers built a miniature human brain-spinal cord model using stem cell-derived organoids to study why damaged nerve cells stop repairing themselves.br /br /The team discovered that a genetic

item.title: 🚨 China has successfully completed the world's first implantation of a commercially approved invasive brain-computer interface (BCI). New device, called NEO, became the first invasive brain implant to
item.description: p🚨 China has successfully completed the world's first implantation of a commercially approved invasive brain-computer interface (BCI).br /br /New device, called NEO, became the first invasive brain implant to receive commercial approval from China's NMPA in March 2026.br /br /The first recipient was
